test_sufficiency_summary: Coverage is strong enough to expose the issue, but verifier reruns reproduced an intermittent failure in TacticalGuiLiveTest::testTacticalDamageSummaryDialogDisplaysContextAndCloseBehavior during the required three-pass GUI command.
documentation_accuracy_summary: AGENTS.md reflects the intended centering-stability policy, but the remaining tactical flake means the documented behavior is not yet fully verified in practice.

cd tests/gui && GDK_BACKEND=x11 ./GuiTests || true && echo "--- rerun ---" && GDK_BACKEND=x11 ./GuiTests || true
